title: EHR Data Density Index (EDI): PySpark pipeline for utilization archetypes and data-density analysis
description: PySpark/Databricks pipeline for GMM-4 EHR utilization archetypes, four-domain density vectors, and Charlson Comorbidity Index association analyses on OMOP CDM data. Includes cohort_1 manuscript pipeline, cohort_2a/2b validation inference, and edi_* artifact layout. Code snapshot at first manuscript submission.
